info.description: Computer‑Based Testing API with subscriptions, academic management, and CBT modules.
info.title: CBT API

post.description: Disable 2FA for the account after verifying the TOTP code.
Verify a TOTP code and enable 2FA for the account.
Generate a TOTP secret and QR code for Google Authenticator.
Requires current password and new password.
Send a password reset OTP to the registered email (if exists).
Authenticate with email and password. If 2FA is enabled, a 2FA token is required.
Invalidate the current session (access token). Requires authentication.
Invalidate all sessions for the authenticated user, except the current one.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile (first name, last name, phone number).

delete.description: Permanently soft‑delete the authenticated user's account.

post.description: Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Create a new user account (student role by default). An email verification OTP will be sent.
Change password after verifying the reset OTP.
Send a one‑time passcode to the user's email address.
post.summary: Send OTP for email verification or password reset

get.description: List all active sessions for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Force logout a device by revoking its session.

post.description: Complete 2FA authentication after login returned "2FA_REQUIRED".
Confirm the user's email using the code received via /send-otp.
Add a class arm (e.g., "Section A") for a school.

get.description: Retrieve a single class arm.

post.description: Add a class level (e.g., "Grade 10") for a school.

get.description: Retrieve a single class level.
List students belonging to a class, with pagination.
get.summary: Get all students in a class

post.description: Create a class combining a class level and a class arm.

get.description: Retrieve a single class.
Generate random questions for a student to practice on a given subject.

post.description: Save or update the student's answer for a question during an active exam attempt.
Create a new exam attempt for a student. Returns exam details and questions.
Finalise the exam attempt, calculate score and store the result.

get.description: Check if the API is running.

post.description: Permanently delete a list of questions by their IDs
Add a question to the bank (supports multiple types, options, tags)

delete.description: Soft‑delete a question (it will not be returned in lists)

post.description: Filter questions by subject, topic, difficulty, bloom level, type, tags, etc.

get.description: Get paginated list of questions for a subject
Retrieve statistics about questions (total, by difficulty, bloom level, etc.) optionally filtered by subject.

post.description: Add a tag that can be used to categorise questions.

get.description: Get a list of all tags and their usage counts.

put.description: Modify an existing question's fields (only provided fields are updated)

get.description: Retrieve a question by its ID
List all class arms belonging to a school.
get.summary: Get all class arms for a school

get.description: List all class levels belonging to a school.
get.summary: Get all class levels for a school

get.description: List classes belonging to a specific school.
get.summary: Get all classes for a school

get.description: List classes for a given school and academic session.
get.summary: Get classes by school and session

get.description: List all academic sessions belonging to a school.
get.summary: Get all sessions for a school

get.description: Retrieve the currently active academic session.
get.summary: Get current session for a school

get.description: List students belonging to a school, with pagination.
get.summary: Get all students in a school

get.description: List classes belonging to a specific academic session.
get.summary: Get all classes for a session

get.description: List terms belonging to an academic session.
get.summary: Get all terms for a session

get.description: Retrieve the currently active term within a session.
get.summary: Get current term for a session

post.description: Add an academic session (e.g., "2025/2026") for a school.

get.description: Retrieve a single academic session.

post.description: Associate a user as a student in a school and class.

get.description: Retrieve a single student record.

put.description: Modify a student's details (e.g., admission number, class).

post.description: Move a student from their current class to a new class.
post.summary: Transfer a student to another class

get.description: List all subscriptions (including inactive) belonging to a school.
get.summary: Get all subscriptions for a school

post.description: Creates a pending subscription and returns a one‑time payment link (Paystack/Flutterwave/Stripe).
Manual verification of a payment intent – usually not needed because webhook handles it.
post.summary: Confirm a payment intent (verify with gateway)

get.description: Returns the currently active (or trial/pending) subscription for a school.
get.summary: Get current active subscription for a school

post.description: Manually verify a payment using the gateway's reference.
post.summary: Verify a payment by gateway reference

get.description: Retrieve a single subscription by its UUID.

put.description: Update tier, auto‑renew, cancel‑at‑end, or status.

post.description: Cancel immediately or at the end of the current period.
Generate a new payment link for a subscription (e.g., manual renewal or upgrade).
post.summary: Create a one‑time payment intent for a subscription

post.description: Extend an active subscription for a new interval (generates a new payment link).

get.summary: Get payment transactions for a subscription

get.description: Current usage vs limits (students, teachers, exams, storage).
get.summary: Get usage statistics for a subscription

post.description: Add a term (e.g., "First Term") for an academic session.

get.description: Retrieve a single term.
Find student record using the associated user ID.

post.description: Paystack, Flutterwave, or Stripe webhook endpoint. No authentication.
